entities.name: SYSTEM DYNAMICS MODELLING
entities.description: A computer-based approach used to simulate scenarios in complex socio-economic systems and agricultural value chains to support policy makers.

entities.name: INDIA
entities.description: The geographic region where the agricultural modelling approach is being applied.

entities.name: AGRICULTURAL VALUE CHAIN
entities.description: A set of all entities involved in all activities and processes from crop production to consumption.

entities.name: SOCIO-ECONOMIC SYSTEMS
entities.description: Complex systems in which agricultural value chain models can simulate various scenarios.

entities.name: CROP PRODUCTION
entities.description: The starting activity within an agricultural value chain.

entities.name: CONSUMPTION
entities.description: The final activity within an agricultural value chain.

entities.name: FARM OUTPUT
entities.description: The agricultural yield or production level that dynamic modelling aims to improve.
